tool_usage.query:
Ascend C gemm_add_relu kernel implementation
AscendC kernel MatMul or GEMM implementation with bias and ReLU fusion; examples of using AscendC TPipe, TQue, and DataCopy with matrix tiles; how to implement matrix multiplication on Ascend 910/910B using AscendC APIs (e.g., Cube or MMA) and then apply bias add and ReLU; sample custom op definitions for fused GEMM.

tool_usage.query:
Ascend C gemm_add_relu kernel implementation
AscendC custom matmul kernel with bias and relu using REGIST_MATMUL_OBJ or MatmulType; examples showing bias addition and activation fusion (ReLU) in matmul kernels; symbols: MatmulType, BatchMatmulKernel, TCubeTiling, AddBias, activation post-ops; Gemm or linear op implementations in AscendC
